slides.title: Interfaces
Polymorphism
Interface Example
slides.codeSnippet:
<?php
interface PaymentGateway {
    public function charge($amount);
}
class StripeGateway implements PaymentGateway {
    public function charge($amount) {
        echo "Charging $$amount via Stripe.";
    }
}
class PayPalGateway implements PaymentGateway {
    public function charge($amount) {
        echo "Charging $$amount via PayPal.";
    }
}
function checkout(PaymentGateway $gateway, $amount) {
    $gateway->charge($amount);
}
$stripe = new StripeGateway();
checkout($stripe, 100);
$paypal = new PayPalGateway();
checkout($paypal, 200);
?>

quizData.question: What keyword is used to implement an interface?
quizData.explanation: A class uses `implements` to adopt an interface.
